title: cerastium brachypetalum var. tauricum
intro: Cerastium brachypetalum var. tauricum, also known as the Tauricum or Short-petaled Mouse-ear Chickweed, is a flowering plant species of the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Cerastium brachypetalum var. tauricum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Cerastium brachypetalum var. tauricum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
